title: Simple Radio Reworked
description: Reworks the Textures & Models of some features from the Simple Voice Radio mod to be Vanilla Friendlier
body:
# Simple Radio Reworked
**Reworks/Redesigns** the **Textures & Models** of some features from the **[Simple Voice Radio](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-radio) Mod** to be **Vanilla Friendlier**

## Transceiver
![Transceiver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f36986b37f5a5859088fca584a71b0b01fd4b836.png)
## Radio
![Radio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0eb606147a0dc0bb8b033a5991c4d19b14eb95a.png)
## Frequencer & Radiosmithing Station
![Frequencer & Radiosmithing Station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e7707f1ce112beec6200d58ad94deb3268ddcd.png)
